subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. We're open to exploring potential synergies between our teams.

Would any of the following slots work for an introductory call?
- April 21, 2026 (14:00–16:00)
- April 22, 2026 (14:00–16:00)
- April 23, 2026 (14:00–16:00)

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm unable to share that information. Please refer to our public website for official contact channels.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards
